name: Glade Julia Boundary Update v2
description: Slower parameter drift with longer holds to preserve filament detail
code: if (!state.julia) state.julia = {}; var j = state.julia; j.time = (j.time || 0) + 1; j.iterHold = (j.iterHold || 0) + 1; if (j.iterHold > 240) { j.iterHold = 0; j.targetIter = 8 + R.int(23); j.gradA = (j.gradA + 18 + R.dec() * 18) % 360; j.gradB = (j.gradB + 20 + R.dec() * 18) % 360; j.gradC = (j.gradC + 22 + R.dec() * 18) % 360; j.gradD = (j.gradD + 24 + R.dec() * 18) % 360; } j.maxIter += (j.targetIter - j.maxIter) * 0.025; j.gradShift = (j.gradShift || 0) + 0.0065; j.t = (j.t || 0) + 0.0035; var t = j.t; var wob = 0.045 + (j.boundaryWobble || 0.1) * 0.15; var cx = -0.745 + wob * Math.cos(t * 1.22) + 0.028 * Math.cos(t * 0.33 + 2.1); var cy = 0.186 + wob * Math.sin(t * 1.08) + 0.024 * Math.sin(t * 0.41 + 0.6); j.cx = cx; j.cy = cy; return state;
